title: pithecellobium trapezifolium
intro: Pithecellobium trapezifolium, also known as the "guanacaste" or "palo de guanacaste," is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pithecellobium trapezifolium include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Pithecellobium trapezifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
